fields.summary: Describes a single variation axis of an OpenType variable font, including its tag, value range, default value, and visibility.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontVariationAxis` holds the metadata for one axis of a variable font,
as exposed by the font's `fvar` table. Use
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.VariationDesignParameters> or
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.GetVariationDesignParameters*> to retrieve the
axes supported by a typeface.

This is a value type and does not require disposal.

## Examples

```csharp
SKFontVariationAxis[] axes = typeface.VariationDesignParameters;
foreach (var axis in axes)
{
    Console.WriteLine(
        $"{axis.Tag}: min={axis.Min}, def={axis.Default}, max={axis.Max}");
}
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Gets or sets the default design-space value for this variation axis.
fields.value: The default axis value in design-space units.

fields.summary: Determines whether the specified <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> is equal to the current instance.

params.obj: The value to compare with the current instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if all fields are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public override readonly bool Equals (object obj);

fields.summary: Determines whether the specified object is equal to the current instance.

params.obj: The object to compare with the current instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="obj" /> is an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> with equal field values; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Returns a hash code for the current instance.
fields.returns: A hash code based on the tag, min, default, max, and hidden flag.

fields.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this axis should be hidden from end-user interfaces.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the axis is marked hidden in the font; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the maximum allowed design-space value for this variation axis.
fields.value: The maximum axis value in design-space units.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the minimum allowed design-space value for this variation axis.
fields.value: The minimum axis value in design-space units.

entries.signature: public static bool operator == (SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis left, SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis right);

fields.summary: Returns a value indicating whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> instances are equal.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="left" /> and <paramref name="right" /> are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public static bool operator != (SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis left, SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis right);

fields.summary: Returns a value indicating whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> instances are not equal.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="left" /> and <paramref name="right" /> are not equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the four-byte tag identifying this variation axis.
fields.value: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> for this axis, for example <c>wght</c> for weight or <c>wdth</c> for width.
